title: Crystallized
description: A mod that adds Crystals to Minecraft!
body:
![Minecraft Crystallized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f64fe114494382a89aec28c4fe09dcc550beba.png)

## Minecraft Crystallized:
### A mod that adds Crystals to Minecraft!
This is a Minecraft mod that adds 9 different Crystals to Minecraft.

You can find Unidentified Crystals by breaking Stone or Deepslate, and you can right-click them to get one of 10 different Crystals!

This Mod also adds Blocks of 3 types, Crystal Blocks, Bricks, and Pillars, for all 10 Crystals the game has.

If you are confused about how the mod only adds 9 Crystals but has Blocks for 10, that's because of Amethysts!
